picks.sp_analysis: Mikolas RELIABLE (xFIP 6.65, recent ERA 12.64, away ERA 7.2, K/9 5.77) vs Keller RELIABLE (xFIP 2.74, recent ERA 1.0, home ERA 1.5, K/9 7.67). Massive SP gap: Keller's 2.74 xFIP and 1.0 recent ERA vs Mikolas' 12.64 recent ERA and 7.2 away ERA. Keller is dominant at home.
picks.lineup_analysis: Nationals away OPS .768 vs Pirates home OPS .789. Nationals away rpg 6.1, Pirates home rpg 5.86. Offensive edge minimal, slightly favors Nationals but not enough to overcome SP gap.
picks.bullpen_note: SEVERE fatigue both sides. Nationals: Wiemer/Lord/Schultz (avg ERA 4.93, POOR quality). Pirates: Sisk/Urquidy/Lawrence (avg ERA 7.38, POOR quality). Pirates pen is worse but both are exhausted and bad.
picks.park_note: PNC Park 0.96 runs, 0.91 HR — pitcher friendly
picks.weather_impact: 70F, 28.6 mph SW crosswind — no directional impact
picks.key_edge: Keller xFIP 2.74 vs Mikolas xFIP 6.65 (3.91 gap), Keller home ERA 1.5 vs Mikolas away ERA 7.2
picks.rationale: Keller has elite SP edge (2.74 xFIP, 1.0 recent ERA, 1.5 home ERA) vs Mikolas (12.64 recent ERA, 7.2 away ERA). Both teams back-to-back and both bullpens SEVERE + POOR. Pirates at -155 exceeds -150 max juice rule. EV only 1.2% below 5% minimum. Despite massive SP edge, the juice kills value and both teams are compromised by fatigue.
picks.avoid_reason: Odds -155 exceed -150 max juice rule. EV 1.2% below 5% minimum. Both teams back-to-back.
picks.flags: Both teams back-to-back, both bullpens SEVERE + POOR, odds exceed max juice

picks.sp_analysis: Meyer RELIABLE (ERA 4.73, xERA 5.36, recent 3.80, K/9 9.53, slider whiff 59%). López VERY_SMALL (3 starts, season ERA 5.40, recent 1.18, home ERA 1.50, K/9 1.8). López recent 1.18 vs season 5.40 = extreme variance, VERY_SMALL sample unreliable.
picks.lineup_analysis: Marlins away OPS .662 vs Braves home OPS .800. Braves have clear lineup edge. Marlins season OPS .908, Braves .875. Splits reverse the advantage heavily toward Braves at home.
picks.bullpen_note: Both SEVERE fatigue. Marlins: Bachar, Faucher, Phillips (pen ERA 3.65, fatigued 3.08 — GOOD quality). Braves: Suarez, Bummer, Muñoz (pen ERA 3.00, fatigued 3.00 — ELITE quality). Braves pen is elite even when fatigued.
picks.weather_impact: 70F, 13.5 mph WSW crosswind — moderate temp, wind neutral
picks.avoid_reason: López VERY_SMALL sample (3 starts) with extreme variance (recent 1.18 vs season 5.40). Cannot trust either direction. Meyer xERA 5.36 suggests regression coming. Both teams back-to-back. No ML odds provided. Total 8.5 has no clear edge — López could implode (5.40 ERA) or continue hot streak (1.18). Variance too high, sample too small.
picks.flags: López VERY_SMALL sample, both teams B2B, no ML odds
